name: Valentina Ríos Castillo
summary: Creative marketing professional with 6 years of experience in brand management and digital campaigns for consumer lifestyle and fashion brands across Latin America. Comfortable operating in fast-paced agency and in-house environments.

experience.title: Marketing Assistant
bullets: Supported account managers on campaigns for 7 consumer brand clients including fashion, beauty, and food verticals.
Created social media content calendars and copy for Instagram and Facebook across 4 client accounts.
Helped coordinate a product launch event that generated 1,200 in-person attendees and 340K impressions on social media.

experience.title: Brand Executive
bullets: Managed day-to-day brand communications for a mid-range women's clothing label across Mexico and Colombia.
Ran paid social campaigns on Meta with a monthly budget of MXN 120,000.
Left role due to company restructuring and brand discontinuation.

experience.title: Digital Marketing Manager
bullets: Owning digital marketing strategy and execution for a DTC brand with MXN 48M annual online revenue.
Scaled Instagram following from 22,000 to 91,000 in 14 months through organic content and influencer partnerships.
Reduced customer acquisition cost (CAC) by 31% by reallocating budget from broad Meta campaigns to retargeting and email flows.
Managed a roster of 14 micro-influencers (50K–200K followers), negotiating contracts and tracking ROI per partnership.
Launched brand into Colombian and Chilean markets — combined first-year revenue of MXN 6.2M.

achievements: Effie México Awards — Shortlisted, Best Digital Campaign (SME Category), 2023
Certified in Google Ads Search and Meta Blueprint (2022)
